name: VirtualBox
description: Free and open-source x86 virtualization hypervisor

download.note: BUILD number not in LATEST.TXT — must scrape directory listing or SHA256SUMS file

changelog.note: Release date in format 'VirtualBox X.Y.Z (released DATE)'

release_date.note: Parse from changelog wiki page near version header

notes: No build in LATEST.TXT — discover from directory listing at download.virtualbox.org/virtualbox/{version}/ or by reading SHA256SUMS. Intel uses 'OSX' suffix, Apple Silicon uses 'macOSArm64'. Also available: LATEST-STABLE.TXT (same as LATEST.TXT), LATEST-BETA.TXT.
